tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Jag vill lägga till requests i requirements.txt.
assertions: Recommends pinning the version with == for direct dependencies
Mentions running the test suite after adding the dependency
Mentions testing locally with pip install before deploying
Mentions verifying the app still starts

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Ett paket funkar lokalt men kraschar i produktion, varför?
assertions: Identifies version mismatch or unpinned dependency as a likely cause
Recommends pinning the exact version with ==
Mentions verifying the deploy or production build goes green
